---
title: "test 数据"
#author: "qiufei"
date: "2024-03-19"
categories: [R,Python, 数据分析]
image: https://hdata.obs.cn-east-3.myhuaweicloud.com/blog/image.jpg # 这是指定整篇文章的主题图片
---

This is a post with executable code.

## python
```{python}
print("Hello, World!")
```

## R 语言

```{r}
print("Hello, World!")
```
